scope: First-party com.apple.* and is.workflow.actions.* ToolKit v78 parameter keys/types from local macOS 27 and iOS 27 Simulator databases, with localized parameter names, sort orders, flags, boolean labels, type names, and per-parameter platform provenance. Descriptions are intentionally omitted. Duplicate parameter keys merged from multiple platform snapshots preserve all observed parsed type names in typePythonNames.
